why did u push all config files? like openclaw.json?

You're right, that was my mistake. I used `git add --all` which picked up everything including the private config files.

I'll fix this right now:

arguments.command:
cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && git rm --cached openclaw.json cron/jobs.json devices/paired.json identity/device-auth.json && echo -e "
# Private config
openclaw.json
cron/
devices/
identity/
tasks/
logs/
*.sqlite*
*.lock" >> .gitignore && git add .gitignore && git commit -m "Remove sensitive config files from git tracking" && git push
